MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. CATHERINE CARY, TEL. NO. 1-888-647-9418, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
CARLOS OCHOA, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. ASSIGNEE SACOR FINANCIAL, INC.'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Granted. Mr. Ochoa explained the garnishment of $276.94 per month that is identified by him at 2(b)(3) in the Financial Statement. The amount of $110.00 to be garnished per pay period. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
